import React from 'react' import SunCalc from 'suncalc' const AzimuthChart = (props) => { const azimuth = [] const sunrise = SunCalc.getTimes(props.date, props.latitude, props.longitude).sunrise const sunriseAzi = SunCalc.getPosition(sunrise, props.latitude, props.longitude).azimuth const sunset = SunCalc.getTimes(props.date, props.latitude, props.longitude).sunset const sunsetAzi = SunCalc.getPosition(sunset, props.latitude, props.longitude).azimuth console.log(sunriseAzi * 180 / Math.PI) console.log(sunsetAzi * 180 / Math.PI) return (
) } export default AzimuthChart
